Hey, I'm looking for a Jasmine. You know her?
Well, of course I know her. She's me.
Any particular reason you're looking for me, sweetie?
Well, don't tell anyone I said this, but you may have a secret admirer. They've sent me up to look for ya.
Secret admirer? Well, how exciting! Why didn't they come lookin' for me themselves?
Let's just say they ran into some obstacles.
Oh! Well, you tell them where to find me, alright?
Did you see her?! Did you glimpse my Jasmine?!
Relax, pal. Yeah, she's up there. I even told her you were a secret admirer. So how about my money?
Wait! I must know! What did you say?
All I told her was that she's got a secret admirer.
She told me to tell you where to find her. Turns out she's right where you thought she was. Up there. Now... my money?
Wait! Let me think. Hmmm... I must capitalize on this fortunate turn of events! But how...?
I don't know, maybe write her a -
Only a genius such as myself could have come up with such an elaborate plan! Now... what to write...
Yes... Yes, that'd be a good place to start...
Maybe you could start the letter with...
Good evening, fair maiden. I am Mark...
To whom it may concern, I am your secret admirer...
You must have amnesia, you forgot that I'm HIM...
Hmm... but how to proposition my fair maiden?
No, no, no! Too simple. Too generic.
Yes, yes! It truly puts my passion to words!
I was wondering if you'd like to go on a date with me.
Call that pussy the Matrix, cuz I'm in it, and I can't get out.
Since our eyes first met, I've wanted to be with you.
Now... what to end it with, I wonder?
Yes... Yes! This is exactly what an intellectual such as myself would say! Incredible!
No! Boring! It would ruin my name for all time if I were to send anyone a letter containing such bland wording!
This shit ain't nothin' to me, man.
I await your response with bated breath. Yours eternally, Mark.
Perfect! Now that my letter is complete, could you-
Yeah, I'll go give it to her. Just gimme a minute, I'll be back.
You are a true saint and a scholar!
Come on, hun! Get a nice shot for Marky!
Hey, darling. Back already? How's my secret admirer doing?
Yeah, he uh... wrote a letter for you.
Oh- Well I can't read too well, hun. What'd he say in it?
Oh- Uh... He's asking you on a date. Apparently he made eye contact with you one time.
Oh, Mark? I know him. That guy was hootin' and hollarin' at one of my shows. Talkin' about true love. Ah, he was a darlin'.
And that got him thrown out?
Well, Klaudia can only take so much of a guy screaming "Awooga!" at the top of his lungs before she snaps.
I'll go find him after I'm done my shift, but until then. You take a picture of this and go show it to him for me in the meantime.
Atta girl! Now go show Mark!
What news do you bring of my fair Jasmine?
Listen, pal. You know the old saying, a picture's worth a thousand words? Well she's a fuckin' poet.
What do you possibly mean by that?
How'd my Mark react to that?
You really knocked him out with that one.
No, like you legitimately knocked him out.
